---
title: "Integration Bee"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    html-math-method: katex
---

This is a series of notes and integrals in preparation for the 2026 UNT Integration Bee. The Integration Bee takes place on April 10th, in GAB 106 at 3pm!

## Table of Contents

- Explicit Integrals

  - Fundamentals

  - Inverse power rule

  - Logarithms and Exponents

  - Trigonometric Functions

- General methods

  - Substitution

  - Integration by parts

  - Partial fraction decomposition

- Specialized methods

  - Trigonometric Identities and powers

  - Trigonometric Substitution

  - Completing the square.

  - Weirstrass Substitution
